Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder
Enclosing class:
PipeFireRuptureInput
public static final class PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder extends Object
Builder for PipeFireRuptureInput.

    • pipeClass

      Sets pipe class.
      Parameters:
      pipeClass - pipe class or piping class identifier
      Returns:
      this builder

      public PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder nominalDiameterInches(double nominalDiameterInches)
      Sets nominal diameter.
      Parameters:
      nominalDiameterInches - nominal diameter in inches; use 0 when unknown
      Returns:
      this builder

      public PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder outsideDiameter(double outsideDiameter, String unit)
      Sets outside diameter.
      Parameters:
      outsideDiameter - value of outside diameter
      unit - unit text, m or mm
      Returns:
      this builder

      public PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder nominalWallThickness(double wallThickness, String unit)
      Sets nominal wall thickness.
      Parameters:
      wallThickness - wall-thickness value
      unit - unit text, m or mm
      Returns:
      this builder

      public PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder corrosionAllowance(double corrosionAllowance, String unit)
      Sets corrosion allowance.
      Parameters:
      corrosionAllowance - corrosion allowance value
      unit - unit text, m or mm
      Returns:
      this builder

    • wallThicknessUndertoleranceFraction

      public PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder wallThicknessUndertoleranceFraction(double undertoleranceFraction)
      Sets wall-thickness undertolerance.
      Parameters:
      undertoleranceFraction - undertolerance fraction, from 0 to below 1
      Returns:
      this builder

    • weldFactor

      public PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder weldFactor(double weldFactor)
      Sets weld factor.
      Parameters:
      weldFactor - weld factor, greater than 0 and less than or equal to 1
      Returns:
      this builder

    • weightStressMPa

      public PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder weightStressMPa(double weightStressMPa)
      Sets the axial weight stress added to longitudinal stress.
      Parameters:
      weightStressMPa - weight stress in MPa
      Returns:
      this builder

    • fluidDensityKgPerM3

      public PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder fluidDensityKgPerM3(double fluidDensityKgPerM3)
      Sets fluid density.
      Parameters:
      fluidDensityKgPerM3 - density in kg/m3; must be positive
      Returns:
      this builder

    • fluidHeatCapacityJPerKgK

      public PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder fluidHeatCapacityJPerKgK(double fluidHeatCapacityJPerKgK)
      Sets fluid heat capacity.
      Parameters:
      fluidHeatCapacityJPerKgK - heat capacity in J/kg-K; must be positive
      Returns:
      this builder

      public PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder gasMolecularWeightKgPerKmol(double gasMolecularWeightKgPerKmol)
      Sets gas molecular weight.
      Parameters:
      gasMolecularWeightKgPerKmol - molecular weight in kg/kmol; must be positive
      Returns:
      this builder

      public PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder initialTemperatureC(double initialTemperatureC)
      Sets initial metal and fluid temperature.
      Parameters:
      initialTemperatureC - initial temperature in degrees Celsius
      Returns:
      this builder

      Parameters:
      exposedLength - value of exposed length
      unit - unit text, m or mm
      Returns:
      this builder

      Returns:
      this builder
